name: Sirin
ability: You start knowing an in-play Townsfolk character. They cannot die.

otherNightReminder: If the Astrologer guessed correctly today, wake them and nod. :reminder:
name: Astrologer
ability: Each day, you may publicly guess the longest chain of good players. Tonight, learn if you were correct.

otherNightReminder: Show the character token. :reminder:
name: Bannik
ability: Each night, learn a character. If you are mad that you are this character, you cannot die at night. If you are mad that you are the Bannik, lose this ability.

firstNightReminder: The Ratcatcher points to a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep; if that player is selected later, wake the Ratcatcher and show them the relevant character token.
otherNightReminder: The Ratcatcher points to a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep; if that player is selected later, wake the Ratcatcher and show them the relevant character token.
name: Ratcatcher
ability: Each night, pick a player. Learn which ability selects them first tonight.

firstNightReminder: The Mediciner points to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Mediciner points to a player. :reminder:
name: Mediciner
ability: Each night, pick a player; they cannot die until Dusk if both of their neighbors are good.

firstNightReminder: The Scholar chooses a character type. Show them a character token of that type that is not in play.
otherNightReminder: The Scholar chooses a character type. Show them a character token of that type that is not in play.
name: Scholar
ability: Each night, choose a character type; learn a not-in-play character of that type. [+1 Outsider]
flavor: Such obsession with what *is* and what *was* is a pedestrian pursuit. Everyone by virtue of being is intimately familiar with all that. What is *not,* however, is perhaps worthy of my attention.

firstNightReminder: The Chort points at a player. Put the Chort to sleep and wake that player. Show the **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** token, then the Chort token.
otherNightReminder: The Chort points at a player. Put the Chort to sleep and wake that player. Show the **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** token, then the Chort token.
name: Chort
ability: Each night, pick a player; they learn that you are the Chort. If anyone is mad that you are the Chort, you and they might be executed (once), even if you are dead.
flavor: Listen to me! LISTEN! I know you can hear me, so cut it out; I don't like this game!

otherNightReminder: The Mortician might point at a player. If they are evil, show the Mortician a thumbs down.
name: Mortician
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: they are resurrected, and you become their alignment.
flavor: There's a simple secret to poke through all this nonsense. You see, we're all just meat. Arms and legs and teeth and eyes of varying sizes and quantities. Particularly teeth, I'm finding.

otherNightReminder: If the Zhrets nominated a living opposing player, a different living opposing player becomes drunk. :reminder:
name: Zhrets
ability: If you nominate and do not execute a living opposing player, a different living opposing player is drunk tonight.
flavor: You must be the last of them. It'll be worse for you if not.

name: Sentry
ability: If you are the last living player on your team, your team wins. The Demon knows who you are, but cannot kill you at night.

otherNightReminder: If the Kikimora died, one of their neighbors dies too. :reminder:
name: Kikimora
ability: Your alive townsfolk neighbors cannot be drunk or poisoned. When you die, one of them dies that night.

name: Hellion
ability: If you die at night, nobody can die at night tomorrow.

otherNightReminder: If the Acolyte died, show them the **YOU ARE** token and the Acolyte token.
name: Acolyte
ability: You think you are a bluff character, but you are not. When you die, learn that you are the Acolyte.
flavor: I've seen it, the monster in the night. But I'm not afraid. The monster is strong, and the monster does not fear. So the solution is simple; I must be like the monster, for it has shown me a way to live that I had never considered.

name: Vila
ability: Each night, one of your good neighbors (different than last night) is drunk, even if you are dead.
flavor: What's a little joy in such a trying time? A drink for anyone who asks! It's no skin off my back!

otherNightReminder: The Strigoi picks a character. :reminder:
name: Strigoi
ability: Each night*, pick a unique Townsfolk character. If this character is in play, they are drunk tonight.
flavor: I have never felt such thirst before in my life - and while I must be very clear that I derive no joy from this - I don't plan to feel it again.

otherNightReminder: If the Planetnik nominated the Demon today, wake the Planetnik and show them a thumbs down. :reminder:
name: Planetnik
ability: If you nominate the Demon, you become evil tonight. If you did not nominate today, you might die.

otherNightReminder: If the Revenant became the Demon today, show them the **YOU ARE** token, then the Demon token, then a thumbs down. Wake the old Demon, show them the **YOU ARE** token, then the Revenant token, then a thumbs up.
name: Revenant
ability: If the Demon dies by execution and five or more players live, switch characters and alignments with them. If you die by execution, your team loses. [-0 to -1 Outsiders]

otherNightReminder: If the Leshy nominated a good player today, show them that player's character token. :reminder: Wake them again when that character would normally wake.
name: Leshy
ability: You have the ability of the good player you most recently nominated, and they are poisoned. You know what it is.
flavor: True empathy is a symptom of old bones. It is wasted on mortals and their short lives.

firstNightReminder: The Concubus chooses two players. :reminder: Show them **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** and the Blud token.
otherNightReminder: The Concubus chooses two players. :reminder: Show them **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** and the Blud token.
name: Concubus
ability: Each night, pick two living players; they learn this and must vote together, or one or both might die tonight.

firstNightReminder: The Fae chooses a player, character, and alignment. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Fae chooses a player, character, and alignment. :reminder:
name: Fae
ability: Each night, choose a player, character, and alignment. They register as your choice.

otherNightReminder: The Mavka might choose to become a not-in-play Demon. Show the **YOU ARE** token & their new character token, then kill the old Demon. :reminder:
name: Mavka
ability: Once per game, at night*, you may choose to become a not-in-play Demon. If so, the living Demon dies and you don't kill tonight.

otherNightReminder: The Svarog chooses a player. :reminder:
name: Svarog
ability: Each night*, choose a player: their neighbors die.

otherNightReminder: The Arbiter chooses a player. :reminder:
name: Arbiter
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk you nominate die tonight. If you nominated a living evil player, you cannot die by execution today.
flavor: Put your trust in me, little lambs, and wisely stay out of my way.

otherNightReminder: The Porevit chooses two players. :reminder::reminder:
name: Porevit
ability: Each night*, choose two players: they die. Your bluffs are in-play characters.

otherNightReminder: The Werewolf chooses a player. :reminder: If an evil player said their phrase, the Werewolf chooses two players. :reminder:
name: Werewolf
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You start knowing a phrase; if an evil player said it publicly today, kill twice and no deaths may be prevented.
flavor: It is, in fairness, a calming spell of sorts. Just not precisely the kind I once sought out.
